posts.author: domwbbv (Dom Hickman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Looking for a developer to pick up where our old developer left off.

We have a WordPress form to Monday integration that pushes new online enquiries to Monday.com.

We need a two way bi-directional API connection between Monday & Trengo (a messaging platform for SMS, Email & WhatsApp).

This would achieve us being able to change a status in Monday, and send a WhatsApp message via Trengo & our WA Business account.

We’d like it that when someone messages us via any platform into Trengo - it cross references their details on Monday and shows us in a custom field on Trengo the basic details of their enquiry.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @domwbbv Welcome to the community!
I would love connect you with our Development Team here at JT’s Cloud, we have dealt with similar use cases using different platforms in the past. We are a certified monday.com partner for over 3 years now.

Are you able to book a meeting with @mitchell.hudson via the below link and we can meet and dive deep into your requirements.
Book meeting here

Look forward to helping you with this solution.

Kind regards,
Alex Robinson
JT’s Cloud

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
